TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kaluluwan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Kaluluwan a niyaro', 125 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 305 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 249 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 55%, 撒奇拉雅族9%, Kebalan 4%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 2%, roma 10%.
S.PHON: kaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uwan itiniaj i fəŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u kaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma **%.
S.FORM: Kaluluwan Itiniay i Fengbin Cen no Hualien ko Kaluluwan a niyaro', 125 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 305 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 249 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 55%, 撒奇拉雅族9%, Kebalan 4%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 2%, roma 10%.
S.PHON: kaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uwan itiniaj i fəŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u kaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma **%.
